name: Makruk
author: AGP
description: Makruk (Thai chess) on an 8x8 board. The King (Khun) moves like a chess king (no castling); the Met (queen) is a ferz that moves one square diagonally; the Khon (a silver-general) moves one square diagonally or one square straight forward; Ruea (rook) and Ma (knight) move as in chess. Bia (pawns) start on the third rank, step one square forward (no double step), capture diagonally forward, and promote to a Met on the sixth rank. Win by checkmate; stalemate is a draw. White (player 0) moves first.
